contacts.notes: Presentation on 1500 Gateway to the Fredericksburg City School Board during public comment; Dr. Wolfenbarger voiced support at the end of the meeting; met with Dr. Wolfenbarger, Superintendent Catlett, Board Member Jarvis Bailey and Clerk of Board Ms. Wilson to thank them.

contacts.name: Dr. Catlett and Dr. Eberhardt
contacts.outcome: School Board request to speak at upcoming meeting was granted
contacts.notes: Shared the benefits to Fredericksburg City Schools, including the $20mm proffer and $500K to CTE. They didn't want to get ahead of city council and confirmed we're a Fredericksburg business before placing us on the agenda.
